title: cordiera edulis
intro: Cordiera edulis, also known as Yerba de Montaña or Mountain Tea, is a plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cordiera edulis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and lower blood pressure. Cordiera edulis can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its numerous health benefits.
